# Echoes of Eternity in Deep Space
## Scripture
"In the beginning, God created the heavens and the earth." - Genesis 1:1

## Reflection
As we gaze up at the vast expanse of deep space, we are reminded of the infinite nature of our Creator. The stars, galaxies, and nebulas that stretch out before us are a testament to God's boundless power and wisdom. In the darkness of space, we find echoes of eternity, whispers of a God who has always been and always will be. Just as the universe is full of mysteries waiting to be uncovered, our faith journey is also full of discoveries waiting to be made. As we explore the depths of God's creation, we are drawn deeper into the mystery of His love and the eternity that awaits us.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we ponder the vastness of deep space, we are humbled by Your infinite nature. Help us to listen for the echoes of eternity that whisper Your presence and Your promises. May our exploration of Your creation deepen our understanding of Your love and our place in Your vast plan. As we gaze up at the stars, may we be reminded of the eternal hope that awaits us in You. Amen.
